Galatians 6:7 states,
"Do not be deceived:
God is not mocked, for whatever a man sows, that he will also reap".
This passage is a warning that one's actions have consequences, and a person will ultimately face the results of their choices, as God cannot be fooled. The concept of "sowing and reaping" is used metaphorically to
illustrate that what one puts into life is what they will get out of it.

These dds idiots think the Lord will bless a monster who mocked him...murdered so man of his fellow human beings...a liar (and the father of lies is satan)...a proud dog turd...a traitor to his own race and motherland...and a mannerless bastard...to these minions of this evil duterte family-you should know by now (if you have the brains and not jackfruits in your head) that your idol, rodrigo roa duterte, have earn the Lord's wrath...do you really believe God will listen to you when during the time of duterte you fully supported that despicable curse from davao?...the wisdom of man is but foolishness in the eyes of God...and yet, you are just a bunch of idiots...God will never listen to you...and you too will soon earn his wrath!

Infairness, Ok lang naman to pray for FPRRD pero kailangan munang niyang at pamilya niyang magpakumbaba, magsisi sa kanilang kasalanan at talikdan ito….hindi pwede mananatili sila sa baluktot nilang gawain sabi nga sa 2Chronicles 7:14 “If My people who are called by My name will humble themselves, and pray and seek My face, and turn from their wicked ways, then I will hear from heaven, and will forgive their sin and heal their land”
God: " He called me Stupid "
sige, pray kayo sa "stupid God"

Jesus said, "Again, truly I tell you that if two of you on earth agree about anything they ask for, IT WILL BE DONE for them by my Father in heaven. For where two or three gather in my name, there am I with them. (Mt18:19-20)"
- Again this instance shows that that promise cannot be fulfilled. What Jesus should have said should be something like, "even if 1,000 people say the same prayer, if it will not be for the greater good, then it will not be granted". That is what we hear as an excuse anyway.

But then, if Jesus said that and told the truth, he won't have many followers and there won't be Christianity.

By the way, here are other predictions/promises of Jesus. All are false.

"For the Son of Man is going to come in his Father’s glory with his angels, and then he will reward each person according to what they have done. Truly I tell you, some who are standing here will not taste death before they see the Son of Man coming in his kingdom.” (Mt 16:27-28)
- Nothing happened for 2000 years. Some say he was talking about the transformation, Pentecost, founding of the Church, etc just to hide this as a failed prophecy but we all know that is not what Jesus described.

"And I tell you, ask and you will receive; seek and you will find; knock and the door will be opened to you. For everyone who asks, receives; and the one who seeks, finds; and to the one who knocks, the door will be opened."(Luke 11:9-10)
- Have you seen someone die even after dozens pray for his recovery?

"In my name they will drive out demons; they will speak in new tongues; THEY WILL PICK UP SNAKES with their hands; and WHEN THEY DRINK DEADLY POISON, IT WILL NOT HURT THEM AT ALL; they will place their hands on sick people, and they will get well." (Mk 16:17-18)
- You know where people go if they accidentally drink poison or got bitten by snakes? To hospitals. No one rushes to priests or pastors so that their hands could be laid on them because nothing happens except give them a better feeling. They don't actually heal. These stories about Jesus are tales.

"Very truly I tell you, whoever believes in me will do the works I have been doing, and THEY WILL DO EVEN GREATER THINGS THAN THESE." (Jn 14:12)
- So far, no one has walked on water, brought someone back to life, etc. These are tales. 🙂

- Anyway, I know people cling to those as they give hope, even if they are not true. Good luck! 🙂 🙂

This ruling if approved by COMELEC en banc will absolve the rest of the elected officials who received donations from contractors that include the president, vice president no less. George Garcia's stance of saying there could be a violation is just to get some 'pogi' from the public. Come on, he was lawyering for some of them before he was appointed to COMELEC. His underlings are doing the dirty job. Sobrang panggagago na ito sa bayan, 'separate juridical personality' daw yong owner from the corporation who owns 99.333% of it. Dissolve COMELEC now. The creation of a new poll body led by competent people with integrity is urgent if we want a credible, honest election.

Literal na pambabaluktot ng comelec sa batas. Kahit magsisigaw pa tayo dito at sa kalsada. Pag ang nasa posisyon ay hindi takot at kayang kaya nilang linangin ang mga tao. Sa kadahilanang NAPAKAHINA AT WALANG NGIPIN ang pinakamataas na pinuno ng bansa. Ay wala tayong magagawa sa ngayon kundi ang mag antay matapos ang kanilang termino. Ang mga matatalino kuno na hinalal ninyo ay ginagamit ang binigay ninyong kapangyarihan sa kanila. Para lamang balahurain ang batas at ang kasagraduhan ng halalan. Walang umuusig kasi wala sa posisyon ang mga taong me kakayanang umusig. 
Kaya, patuloy tayong lalapastanganin ng mga ganid ng mga demonyong ito. Kung hindi tayo magbabago sa pagpili ng tamang mga binuboto.  Dead end na ito until 2028. Ito ang sukli o kabayaran ng inyong kabobohan. Tangapin ninyo ang pait at hapdi na dulot ng inyong katangahan.  Karamay ang lahat ng mga Pilipino lalo na ang mga inosenteng kabataan. Maawa naman kayo sa bayan. Naway, patawarin sila ng Dios sa kanilang mga ginagawa sa bayan. Maging mapanuri at maging Critical Thinker sa panahon ng karimlan.
Kc daw hindi naman "natural person" si Lubiano. Sya daw ay taga Planet Mars. Akala ng taga Comolec ang Sorsogon ay sa Mars.
